metadata.description: Custom Dashboard Agent (Lite) - Build or resume custom dashboards from Treasure Data databases using a self-serve 5-phase pipeline

plugins.name: fde-tais-dashboard-builder
plugins.description: Build or resume custom dashboards from Treasure Data databases using a self-serve 5-phase pipeline (requirements + data discovery, workflow deployment, interactive build, automation, handoff). Lite version — no Confluence, no git branching, HTML Client rendering only.
